prompt:
Create an original retro sci-fi action hero for a small
browser game. Use the broad archetype of a brash 1990s action-game
protagonist without copying any existing character: square-jawed face,
tall blond flat-top haircut, black rectangular sunglasses, muscular bare
arms, a red sleeveless tactical top, dark combat trousers, black fingerless
gloves, ammunition belt, and heavy black combat boots. Use an exaggerated,
confident silhouette that remains readable when reduced to 96x96 pixels.

Render high-quality black-first pixel art with sharp white highlights, gray
hatch-like volume strokes, restrained red accents, a limited retro palette,
hard crisp pixel clusters, and no soft painterly shading. The result must be
an original design with no text, logo, interface, trademark, or exact
likeness of a protected character.

Create the canonical identity reference in a relaxed, combat-ready idle stance. The compact futuristic pistol is lowered but visible. Preserve a clean side-on screen-left read.

The source canvas is square. Show exactly one complete
full-body character in exactly one pose. This is one static game image, not
an animation, sprite sheet, sequence, lineup, turn-around, or multi-panel
composition. The character faces screen-left. Keep the same camera, apparent
body scale, horizontal center, and generous outer padding as the supplied
reference. Do not crop hair, weapon, hands, or boots. Use a perfectly uniform
opaque #ff00ff magenta background across the entire canvas, without a
ground plane, shadow, texture, gradient, border, or scenery.
